response.justification: Strong 20-year engineering background with demonstrated scale experience, but critically lacks experimentation platform, telemetry, and measurement system expertise—core to this Principal-level growth role. While engineering fundamentals are solid, the resume shows no portfolio in the required domain, though full-stack capabilities could enable rapid learning with proper mentorship.
strengths: 20 years of progressive engineering experience with multiple senior/staff roles handling systems at scale
Proven ability to architect and ship production systems (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/second, Optilyz direct mail platform, GISCollective open-source)
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentorship, conference talks, and community contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems—core to the role
No evidence of working with metrics, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis in growth and experimentation contexts
Resume shows breadth across many domains but lacks depth in measurement systems and data-driven experimentation methodology

key_factors.factor: Strong 20-year track record with scale experience
No demonstrated metrics, telemetry, or statistical background
